## 🏢 Role in Strategic Blueprint
This repository is categorized under the **Personal Data Reflection Engine** mega-project.

### Repository Purpose & Role:
React Native / Expo mobile application providing battery-optimized background GPS tracking, location geofencing, and proximity checks to trigger local habit reminders.

### Primary Local Code Snippet:
* **File**: `expo_location_service.ts (Expo background location service)`

## 🧪 Reorganization Background (June 2026)
This project was synced, archived, and cleaned up as part of a pair programming session with Gemini/Antigravity.
To keep the local machine clean, codebases have been pushed to private repositories on GitHub. 
Other AI tools (or developer sessions) can point to this repository and pull it down locally into `C:\Users\dschm\Documents\antigravity\workspace\` when resuming active development.

### Alignment to Other Projects:
1. **The Conductor (Autonomous Coder/Agent Team)**: Context-driven agents cooperating to solve tasks.
2. **Smart Source Ingest (NotebookLM Pipeline)**: Audio transcripts, YouTube scrapers, RSS feeds compiling docs into Google Drive.
3. **Reflection Engine (Self-Data Feedback Loop)**: Private, self-hosted tracking server and geofencing app for habits/fasting.
4. **Chrome Context & Export Accelerator**: Browser sensors to clip highlights, export chats, and bridge pages to PARA storage.
